case_title: DARIAN DOWNS VS. JOHN EHRLICH et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOWNS, DARIAN ,AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT EHRLICH, JOHN ,AN INDIVIDUAL EHRLICH, COLEEN ,AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-23-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-18-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-08-2011

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-23-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-06-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST HOWARD OLSEN, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-06-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-22-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF DOWNS, DARIAN ,AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
